headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -109.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 38% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 184 quotes and an overwhelming 165 at strong intensity, driving the score to 90.6 — people are venting hard today.
• This frustration level sits in the upper half of the 187-day range (max 172.1), making today notably elevated but not a record.
• Frustrations jumped sharply from yesterday's 54.9, while Fears and Optimism both edged slightly in a positive direction but remain deeply negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
